definition: Repositories classified as first-wave flagships in the portfolio classification.
caveat: This is a portfolio classification count, not an external ranking.

definition: Projects listed in the public project catalog JSON.
Portfolio labs listed in the public README and website.
caveat: Labs are an internal portfolio organization system.

definition: Journal articles listed under peer-reviewed publications on the public publications page.
Policy reports listed on the public publications page with public links.
caveat: Impact beneficiaries or institutional uptake are not claimed.

definition: Public portfolio project with a Zenodo DOI.
caveat: Only DOI existence is claimed, not downloads or citations.

metric: Public dashboards, explorers or report pages
definition: Public pages listed in the project catalog as dashboards, static dashboards, static galleries or analytical reports.
caveat: This counts public portfolio products, not active users.

definition: Geographies named across the public project catalog and README.
caveat: Country coverage varies by project and should be checked in each repository.

value: descriptive analytics; panel data; econometrics; forecasting; survey analysis; spatial analysis; machine learning readiness; data quality; reproducibility
definition: Methods represented in the Research Mode evidence structure and role-skills matrix.
